title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 18–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #16, Momonosuke as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guess we don't need to lend a hand after all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed, and that Haki just now was really something too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A familiar face just popped into my head.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: A ship drifting in the vast Ocean!
